description: A plain candid group photograph with no design overlay or added on-image text (the only text is printed on the agents' jackets). Inside an institutional room with white cinderblock walls and a teal/blue floor, roughly a dozen detained men (faces blurred/pixelated) stand lined up along the back wall. In the foreground, their backs to the camera, are several law-enforcement officers wearing jackets labeled 'DEA AGENT' (two of them), 'POLICE HSI', and one in an olive jacket with a Border Patrol shoulder patch. Per the tweet, this shows 16 illegal aliens arrested after attempting to flee ICE Gulfport officers during a Mississippi worksite inspection, assisted by ATF, DEA, and CBP Border Patrol. Although it conveys an enforcement message, the image itself is an unstyled documentary photo with no graphic design, agency seal overlay, or slogan, so it is not a designed meme.
